message:
test(snapshots): add comprehensive JSON output snapshot tests

Add insta snapshot tests for all br CLI commands that produce JSON
output, ensuring structured output format stability across changes.

Test file (tests/snapshots/json_output.rs — 341 new lines):
- blocked_empty_json_output: br blocked --json with no blocked issues
- count_empty_json_output: br count --json with empty tracker
- count_grouped_by_priority_json_output: br count --by priority --json
- count_grouped_by_type_json_output: br count --by type --json
- graph_all_json_output: br graph --json showing dependency graph
- list_empty_json_output: br list --json with empty tracker
- list_priority_ordering_json_output: br list --json verifying sort order
- ready_empty_json_output: br ready --json with no ready issues
- ready_priority_ordering_json_output: br ready --json with priority sort
- search_no_match_json_output: br search "nonexistent" --json

Snapshot files (tests/snapshots/snapshots/):
- 10 new .snap files capturing expected JSON output for each test case

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,52 @@
+---
+source: tests/snapshots/json_output.rs
+expression: normalize_json(&json)
+---
+{
+  "components": [
+    {
+      "nodes": [
+        {
+          "id": "ISSUE_ID",
+          "title": "Graph root A",
+          "status": "open",
+          "priority": 2,
+          "depth": 0
+        },
+        {
+          "id": "ISSUE_ID",
+          "title": "Graph child of A",
+          "status": "open",
+          "priority": 2,
+          "depth": 1
+        }
+      ],
+      "edges": [
+        [
+          "ISSUE_ID",
+          "ISSUE_ID"
+        ]
+      ],
+      "roots": [
+        "ISSUE_ID"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "nodes": [
+        {
+          "id": "ISSUE_ID",
+          "title": "Graph root B",
+          "status": "open",
+          "priority": 2,
+          "depth": 0
+        }
+      ],
+      "edges": [],
+      "roots": [
+        "ISSUE_ID"
+      ]
+    }
+  ],
+  "total_nodes": 3,
+  "total_components": 2
+}
